synthesis_text: COVID-19 is a contagious disease [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000] caused by the coronavirus SARS-CoV-2 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000, doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024].

COVID-19 is an illness caused by a virus [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000], specifically the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. It is an infectious respiratory illness [node_c:0:c9027802] and can lead to hospital care or death [node_b:3:df09d2ee]. COVID-19 spreads between people in close contact [node_b:2:82eba3bc] and can cause serious medical complications [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00004].
COVID-19 is an infectious respiratory illness caused by a coronavirus called SARS-CoV-2 [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].
